privileged_info_summary: The task generates synthetic tracking footage locally using Blender, not from a real dataset. The footage directory is /home/ga/footage and contains 40 frames (1-40) of synthetically rendered tracking footage with black markers on a white ground plane. The task requires solving camera motion with at least 15 tracked features and a solve error less than 1.0 pixel, with a minimum score of 70/100 to pass. The solved camera is saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/tracking_solved.blend.
